windows.title: TrishDrive — Tải file từ Thư viện TrishTEAM

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com https://accounts.google.com https://api.github.com https://*.github.com https://trishteam.io.vn https://*.trishteam.io.vn; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://*.googleusercontent.com https://www.gstatic.com https://*.t.me; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com https://accounts.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://trishteam-17c2d.firebaseapp.com https://accounts.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Lưu trữ file không giới hạn dung lượng qua Telegram. Upload chia chunk + AES-256 encrypt + SQLite index. Bot API cho file < 50MB, MTProto cho file lớn hơn (Phase 23).
